description: General-recall fixture for WP1b.5 CI benchmark. 15 operator-authored memories across hobby-electronics, garden, and home channels; 10 labeled queries including 2 with no relevant memory. Labels are hand-written per bootstrap-mapping §6.

memories.summary: kestrel's weather station is an ESP32 build; it was dropping off wifi after a few hours until wifi power-save was disabled (WIFI_PS_NONE), which fixed it.
kestrel moved the rain gauge to the north fence, which made its readings saner (previous location caused splash-over anomalies).
kestrel prefers PlatformIO over the Arduino IDE and keeps all firmware projects in a monorepo called birdhouse.
The greenhouse humidity sensor (SHT31) reads about 4% high; agreed to apply a -4 offset in firmware rather than replace it.
robin's soldering iron is a Pinecil; the USB-C supply must be 20V-capable or the tip won't reach temperature.
The shared parts bin has run out of BC547 transistors; robin volunteered to reorder from the usual distributor.
kestrel's solar charge controller logs to MQTT topic garden/power; retention on the broker is 7 days.
Decision: all outdoor sensor enclosures get conformal coating after the spring condensation failures.
robin volunteered to write up the wiring schema for the main electronics bench as a Markdown doc in the birdhouse repo.
kestrel's Makita 18V tools share batteries with the shop vac but not with the older 14.4V drill; confirmed the battery form factor is incompatible.
The compost bin temperature sensor is a DS18B20 on a 2-meter cable; it reads consistently about 1.5°C high in ambient air.
The grow light timer in the seedling cabinet is set to 14 hours per day for the tomato seedlings; kestrel will reduce to 12h after transplanting.
kestrel prefers VSCode with the YAML extension over vim for editing config files; mainly for inline schema validation.
The garden irrigation controller is a Wemos D1 Mini running ESPHome; it controls four solenoid valves on a schedule loaded from YAML.
kestrel set up a Raspberry Pi 4 as a home server running Home Assistant and Mosquitto; it backs up nightly to a USB drive.

queries.text: Why did the ESP32 weather station keep losing its wifi connection?
queries.note: m1 is the only memory about the wifi dropout and its WIFI_PS_NONE fix.

queries.text: What is the humidity sensor problem in the greenhouse and how was it addressed?
queries.note: m4 records the SHT31 high-reading bias and the firmware-offset decision.

queries.text: What power supply does the Pinecil soldering iron need?
queries.note: m5 specifies the 20V USB-C supply requirement for the Pinecil tip temperature.

queries.text: Where does the solar charge controller publish its data?
queries.note: m7 records the MQTT topic garden/power and the 7-day broker retention.

queries.text: What temperature sensor is in the compost bin?
queries.note: m11 records the DS18B20 on a 2-meter cable and its +1.5°C ambient bias.

queries.text: What controls the garden irrigation valves and how is it configured?
queries.note: m14 records the Wemos D1 Mini running ESPHome with YAML-loaded solenoid schedule.

queries.text: What tool does kestrel use as a home server and what runs on it?
queries.note: m15 records the Raspberry Pi 4 with Home Assistant and Mosquitto.

queries.text: What is kestrel's preferred firmware development environment?
queries.note: m3 records the PlatformIO preference and the birdhouse monorepo.

queries.text: Has anyone ordered a 3D printer for the lab yet?
queries.note: No memory of a 3D printer. This is a negative case — the system should admit nothing.

queries.text: What guitar model does kestrel play?
queries.note: No memory of any guitar. This is a negative case — the system should admit nothing.
